description:
Black out or dim idle secondary monitors to help prevent OLED burn-in.


🛠 What’s New
🚀 Improvements
- Start hidden in tray at system startup (@WalleBot9, @Quorthon13)
⚙️ Changes
- Add command-line argument to start the program in the tray without opening a window (@WalleBot9)
🧩 Fixes
- Fix overlay not applying properly on negative coords (@Quorthon13)
💾 Installation
1. Download OLED-Sleeper-2.1.0-Setup.exe from the Assets below.
2. Run the installer and follow the setup steps.
3. (Optional) Enable Run at Startup during installation if you want it to start automatically.
📋 Requirements
- Windows 10 or 11
- DDC/CI support (required only for brightness dimming)
Full Changelog: v2.0.0...v2.1.0
